name: SkillsBuilder QC-Centric Ontology
description: Professional quality control framework focusing on defense lifecycle and technical compliance.

categories.iqc: Incoming Quality Control: Suppliers, material specs, receiving inspections, raw materials.
categories.pqc: In-Process Quality Control: Mold/machine parameters, hourly inspections, FAI, production records.
categories.oqc: Outgoing Quality Control: Shipment reports, COA/COC, packaging, customer delivery.
categories.capa: Corrective and Preventive Action: Complaints, 8D reports, root causes, improvements.
categories.nca: Non-Conformance Action: Anomalies, sorting records, rework, MRB decisions.
categories.spec: Technical Specifications: Drawings, CTQ dimensions, tolerances, standards.
categories.msa: Metrology & MSA: Calibration, Gage R&R, measurement equipment, stability.
categories.qms: Quality Management System: ISO, SOPs, internal audits, document control.
categories.project: Specific Project/Product codes linking all QC activities.
categories.man: Stakeholders: QC engineers, vendors, customer contact points.
